summary: V3 Pipeline Logs Feature Testing (Iteration 60) - NEW feature for structured logging of N1/N2/N3 pipeline evaluations. Backend: 11/12 tests passed (1 test had timeout handling issue, fixed). All 3 pipeline-logs endpoints working correctly. Frontend: Login page renders without errors, Dashboard loads with Logs button (data-testid='pipeline-logs-btn'), PipelineLogsPanel opens and displays logs with stats, filters, and expandable rows.

ui_bugs.issue: RangeError: Invalid language tag: en-US@posix - locale formatting issue in chart library creates overlay
ui_bugs.note: PRE-EXISTING issue from iteration_59. Workaround: remove overlay via JS or use force=True for clicks.

passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/v3/pipeline-logs - returns logs with filters (symbol, outcome, regime, hours, limit)
✅ GET /api/v3/pipeline-logs - returns summary with outcomes, regimes, avg_duration_ms, top_n2_block_reasons
✅ GET /api/v3/signal/MNQ - triggers V3 evaluation (creates log when verbose enabled)
✅ Log structure verified: timestamp, symbol, outcome, duration_ms (fetch/n1/n2/n3/total), n1, n2, n3, data_quality
✅ Edge cases handled (invalid hours, zero limit, nonexistent symbol)
✅ Frontend login page loads with google-login-btn data-testid
✅ PipelineLogsPanel shows stats bar (evaluations, latency, fetch gargalo, N2 filtros, max latency, active signals)
✅ PipelineLogsPanel shows top N2 block reasons
✅ PipelineLogsPanel has filter dropdowns (filter-symbol, filter-outcome, filter-regime, filter-hours)
✅ PipelineLogsPanel displays log rows with expandable details
critical_code_review_comments: Pipeline logging implementation is correct - logs are saved to MongoDB v3_pipeline_logs collection
TTL index (30 days) is properly configured for auto-cleanup
Verbose mode toggle works via environment variable V3_VERBOSE_LOGGING
Duration instrumentation captures fetch/n1/n2/n3/total timings correctly
Summary aggregation includes outcomes, regimes, avg_duration_ms, and top_n2_block_reasons
Frontend PipelineLogsPanel component is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: None - logs are created automatically when V3 evaluations run
context_for_next_testing_agent: V3 Pipeline Logs feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/v3/pipeline-logs, GET /api/v3/pipeline-logs/stats, POST /api/v3/pipeline-logs/verbose. Frontend: PipelineLogsPanel.jsx with Logs button in nav bar. Pre-existing chart locale issue (en-US@posix) still present but not blocking. SignalStack webhook is MOCKED.
mocked_api_note: SignalStack webhook is MOCKED (returns mock 201). All other data is REAL from MongoDB/DataBento.

pipeline_logs_endpoints.GET /api/v3/pipeline-logs: Working - returns logs with filters and summary

frontend_components.Stats bar: Shows evaluations, latency metrics, active signals
frontend_components.Filters: Symbol, outcome, regime, hours dropdowns working
